creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=8627e70f7039455e52e329a4dd4d00ebb16c3a95

commit 8627e70f7039455e52e329a4dd4d00ebb16c3a95
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2024-05-16 15:42:24 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-05-17 06:45:33 +0000

    net-p2p/lidarr: Update to 2.3.3.4204

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Lidarr/Lidarr/releases/tag/v2.3.3.4204

     * Bump Npgsql to 7.0.7
     * New: Optionally use Environment Variables for settings in config.xml
     * Minor translations to album interactive search
     * Fallback value for statistics
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Refactor PasswordInput to use type password
     * Fixed: Text color for inputs on login page
     * New: Dark theme for login screen
     * New: Support stoppedUP and stoppedDL states from qBittorrent
     * Use number input for seed ratio

    PR:             279033
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)

 net-p2p/lidarr/Makefile  |  6 +++---
 net-p2p/lidarr/distinfo  |  6 +++---
 net-p2p/lidarr/pkg-plist | 21 +++++++++------------
 3 files changed, 15 insertions(+), 18 deletions(-)
